query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_records,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN drawTime LIKE '% 21:%' THEN 1 END) as hour_21_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN drawTime LIKE '% 22:%' THEN 1 END) as hour_22_count
FROM draw_records 
WHERE drawTime LIKE '115/03/15%'
